description: §61.2/§61.5 — a self-closing `<Ping/>` arm is a no-op handler (it returns the default-success 204 envelope with no result), and it counts toward exhaustiveness. An `<endpoint>` covering `Ping` via a self-closing arm + `Lookup` via a `:`-shorthand arm is exhaustive over the enum — no E-ENDPOINT-NOT-EXHAUSTIVE, no E-ENDPOINT-MULTI-STATEMENT-ARM.
rationale: §61.2: the self-closing `<Variant/>` arm is one of the three supported body forms (a no-op → 204, §61.5); it satisfies exhaustiveness like any other arm. So the family stays silent on a self-closing + shorthand exhaustive pair.
